---
title: "Welcome to my website!"
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-float: true
toc-title: Content
toc-depth: 3
pagetitle: "{{< meta website.title >}}"
main-photo: /img/Hussain_Hadah-2025-09-04-07945pp.jpg
main-photo-square: /img/Hussain_Hadah-2025-09-04-07945pp.jpg
title-block-banner: "#CF4446"
listing:
  - id: home-articles
    contents: "research/articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: html/research/listing.ejs
    categories: false
  - id: home-working-papers
    contents: "research/working-papers/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: html/research/listing.ejs
    categories: false
  - id: home-wip
    contents: "research/works-in-progress/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: html/research/listing.ejs
    categories: false
format:
  html:
    quarto-template-params:
      banner-header-class: "home"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4}

```{=html}
<div class="grid" style="--bs-columns: 5; row-gap: 0;">
  <div class="g-col-1 g-col-sm-0"></div>
  <div class="g-col-4 g-col-sm-6">
    <picture>
      <source media="(max-width: 576px)" srcset="{{< meta main-photo-square >}}">
      <source media="(min-width: 576px)" srcset="{{< meta main-photo >}}">
      <img class="img-fluid" src="{{< meta main-photo >}}" alt="{{< meta author-meta >}}"
     style="width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 2/3; object-fit: cover; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);">
    </picture>
  </div>
  <div class="g-col-0 g-col-sm-0"></div>
</div>

```

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-8}

# About Me

I am a labor, health, and education economist and a postdoctoral fellow at Tulane University's [Murphy Institute](https://murphy.tulane.edu/) and the [Department of Economics](https://liberalarts.tulane.edu/departments/economics). My research uses causal inference methods, field experiments, and administrative data to evaluate policies and understand economic behavior in contexts such as discrimination, identity formation, peer effects, institutional effectiveness, and public health interventions.

I am also a Research Affiliate at the [IZA Institute of Labor Economics](https://www.iza.org/person/34828/hussain-hadah).

My work addresses critical policy questions with real-world impact. I have published in the *Journal of Economics, Race, and Policy* on how Hispanic surnames affect educational and labor market outcomes, and my ongoing projects examine discrimination in mortgage lending, school admissions, and the role of ethnic perceptions in Hispanic self-identification.

My research on school choice and discrimination, supported by the Abdul Latif Jameel Poverty Action Lab (J-PAL) Social Policy Research Initiative, investigates discrimination in admissions across private, charter, and traditional public schools.

I earned my PhD in Economics from the University of Houston in 2023, and graduated with a B.S. in Economics from Arizona State University. 

[Outside](https://hussainhadah.com/personal/) of economics, I enjoy running with my two dogs through New Orleans, following college and professional sports, and exploring the city's incredible culinary scene.

Please feel free to contact me if you have questions about my work or would like to discuss economic research.

<i class="fa-solid fa-envelope"></i> Please feel free to [contact me](mailto:hussainhadah@gmail.com) via email.

<i class="fa-solid fa-download"></i> Download my [curriculum vitae](https://hussainhadah.com/cv/cv.pdf), [research statement](https://hhadah.github.io/statements/Hadah_Research.pdf), [diversity statement](https://hhadah.github.io/statements/Hadah_Diversity.pdf), and [teaching statement](https://hhadah.github.io/statements/Hadah_Teaching.pdf).

:::

:::

# Recent Highlights

::: {.callout-tip icon=false}
### Latest Publications & Achievements

- **NBER Presentation:** I presented [_"Immigration Enforcement and Hispanic Identity"_](https://hussainhadah.com/research/working-papers/hadah-denteh/immigration_enforcement_hispanic.pdf) at the [NBER Economics of Race and Stratification](https://www.youtube.com/live/9j5VG4eZet8?si=H-wQVlJr51r37lvT&t=20353) conference ([watch here](https://www.youtube.com/live/9j5VG4eZet8?si=H-wQVlJr51r37lvT&t=20353)).
- **$140,746 Grant** from J-PAL Social Policy Research Initiative for school choice discrimination research
- **Revise & Resubmit** at *Journal of Policy Analysis and Management*: "The Effect of Anti-Asian Attitudes on Asian Identity in the U.S."
:::

# Interests & Education

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Interests

- Applied Microeconomics
- Labor Economics
- Education Economics
- Health Economics
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}
<!-- empty column to create gap -->
:::

::: {.column width="45%"}
### Education

<i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> <span style="color:black;">Ph.D. in Economics, 2023</span><br><span style="color:gray;font-size:small;">University of Houston, Houston, TX</span>

<i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> <span style="color:black;">M.A. in Economics, 2020</span><br><span style="color:gray;font-size:small;">University of Houston, Houston, TX</span>

<i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i> <span style="color:black;">B.S. in Economics (<em>Summa Cum Laude</em>), 2017</span><br><span style="color:gray;font-size:small;">Arizona State University, Tempe, AZ</span>

:::

::::

# Research

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## Quick Links
- [Published Work](#publications) | [Working Papers](#working-papers) | [Works in Progress](#research-in-progress)

**Note**: * = Student co-author at time of writing/research
:::

## Publications {#publications}

:::{#home-articles}
:::

## Working Papers {#working-papers}

:::{#home-working-papers}
:::

## Works in Progress {#research-in-progress}

:::{#home-wip}
:::
